docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORRIS, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT FAUSS, NICOLE ,AN INDIVIDUAL AND A GENERAL PARTNER OF SILVERPAGESINFO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
